title: Senior Doctor - Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
